zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Massey於1330年出生在英國爾丁培利時，她的父親Hamon Massey32歲，母親Matilda Timperley29歲。她於1350年與William de Stanley在英國爾丁培利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1419年在英國爾斯托雷頓享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Massey于1330年出生在英国爾丁培利时，她的父亲Hamon Massey32岁，母亲Matilda Timperley29岁。她于1350年与William de Stanley在英国爾丁培利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1419年在英国爾斯托雷頓享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Massey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Massy, a pet form of Matthew . Compare Mace .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of several places in Normandy, such as Macey (Manche), Massy (Seine-Maritime), Macé-sur-Orne (Orne), and La Ferté Macé (Orne).
English: variant of Marsay (see Marcey ).

variants.name: Mace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Masse, probably a shortened form of Matthew (compare Massey and Massett ) or possibly of Thomas .
French and Breton (Macé): from the French personal name Macé, a vernacular form of Mathieu ‘Matthew’. Compare Masse 5 and Maze 3.

French (Macé): habitational name from Macé or La Ferté-Macé in Orne, the former so named from Gallo-Roman Macciacum (from the personal name Maccius + the locative suffix -acum), the latter from the personal name Macé (see 2 above).

variants.name: Massie
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeen): variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Marsee
meanings: English: altered form of   Massey  .

variants.name: Massee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Germain.
Possibly an altered form of English   Massey  .
French (Massée): from the feminine form of Massé (see Masse ). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Massa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Silvio, Annamarie, Biagio, Caesar, Carmela, Dante, Elisabetta, Ennio.

Italian: habitational name from any of various places called Massa, for example Massa Lubrense or Massa di Somma, both in Naples province, or Masse d'Albe in Aquila, all named from medieval Latin massa ‘farm, estate’ (from Latin massa ‘mass, lump, pile’, Greek maza). This surname is also found in southern France (see Massey 5).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Macey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .
Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Macej or Mačej and Polish Maciej , derivatives of the Latin personal name Matthaeus (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Masey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Macy
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Massey was born in 1330, in Timperley, Cheshire, England, her father, Hamon Massey, was 32 and her mother, Matilda Timperley, was 29. She married William de Stanley in 1350, in Timperley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1419, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Massey est née en 1330, à Timperley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hamon Massey, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Matilda Timperley, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William de Stanley en 1350, à Timperley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1419, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Massey 1330 in Timperley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hamon Massey 32 und ihre Mutter Matilda Timperley 29. Sie hat 1350 in Timperley, Cheshire, England William de Stanley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1419 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Storeton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Massey è nata il nel 1330 nel Timperley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hamon Massey, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Matilda Timperley, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William de Stanley nel 1350, nel Timperley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1419, nel Storeton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Masseyが1330年にイギリスチェシュアイアティンペルリーで生まれた時，父Hamon Masseyは32歳，母Matilda Timperleyは29歳であった。1350年にイギリスチェシュアイアティンペルリーでWilliam de Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1419年にイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Massey(이)가 1330년 영국 체실르 팀피를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hamon Massey(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Timperley(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 체실르 팀피를리에서 William de Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1419년 영국 체실르 스토레턴에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Massey nasceu em 1330, em Timperley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hamon Massey, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Timperley, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Stanley em 1350, em Timperley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1419, em Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Massey родилась в 1330 г. в местности тимпирли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hamon Massey было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Timperley, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Stanley в 1350 г. в местности тимпирли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1419 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Massey nació en 1330, en Timperley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hamon Massey, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Matilda Timperley, tenía 29 años. Se casó con William de Stanley en 1350, en Timperley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1419, en Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años.
